retrieved_result: Who is Icarus? Who is Icarus? January 16, 2011 , cherran , Leave a comment Who is Icarus? Icarus is one famous character in Greek Mythology. He is the son of Nausicrates and Daedalus, the great inventor, architect, and artist. Icarus’ life, and eventually his death, has a great connection to his father’s own story
